title: CULTURAL ARTS - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CULTURAL ARTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers weekly Culture Nights that provide dinner, beading, singing, crafting, intertribal drumming and dancing. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Primarily serves self-identified Native Americans of all ages Hours: -Wednesday 6pm-8pm during the school year. Wednesday holidays and school closures are observed. -Dinner: Wednesday 6:pm-6:30pm Email (503) 288-8177 267 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 288-8177 ext 267 Michaila Taylor [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Visit website for an updated events calendar. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Arts and Crafts Instruction * Native American Community Cultural Heritage Programs * Native American Community Dance Instruction * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - MICRO ENTERPRISE EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MANY NATIONS ACADEMY EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLEGE AND CAREER SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH EQUITY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS YOUTH SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - NAYA GENERATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTER CARE SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE INDIAN PARENTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS AND SEASONAL PROGRAMMING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION MUTUAL SUPPORT - HEALING CIRCLE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
